title: BuildCompletenessReport
description: The KEYSTONE oracle's output. Answers: if a build agent built every bead, would the plan's outcomes be achieved? Three sub-scores + localized missing[] evidence. Produced by eval/build-completeness.mjs from a snapshot + an outcome manifest.

edgeCoverage.description: every requiredEdge realized as a real (transitive) edge

beadPresence.description: every outcome/requirement/surface/concern/must-have covered; no orphan; no scope-drift

buildReadiness.description: every bead carries the info a build agent needs (tier-0 mechanical; tier-1 bounded judgment)

buildComplete.description: true iff all three sub-scores meet their thresholds
